contentBlocks.original:
नमस्ते शारदा देवी काश्मीर पुरवासिनि ।
त्वामहं प्रार्थये नित्यं विद्यादानं च देहि मे ।।
contentBlocks.transliteration:
namaste śāradā devī kāśmīra puravāsini .
tvāmahaṃ prārthaye nityaṃ vidyādānaṃ ca dehi me ..
contentBlocks.translation: O Sharada devi, resident of Kashmir, I pray to you everyday, may you bless me with education.
contentBlocks.meanings: नमस्ते (namaste) – salutations; शारदा (śāradā) – Sharada; देवी (devī) – goddess; काश्मीर (kāśmīra) – Kashmir; पुरवासिनि (puravāsini) – resident of the city (pura:city | vāsini:resident); त्वाम् (tvām) – you; अहम् (aham) – I; प्रार्थये (prārthaye) – pray; नित्यम् (nityam) – everyday; विद्यादानम् (vidyādānam) – education (vidyā:knowledge | dānam:giving); च (ca) – and; देहि (dehi) – give; मे (me) – to me;
